intro.text: Browse tax-related forms by category. Click a category to view the available forms.

formsSection.subtitle: Select a category below to view associated forms.

categories.title: Real Property
categories.description: Forms related to real property and homestead matters.

forms.name: PT-50R Property Return Form
forms.description: Return form for real property records.

forms.name: PT-311A Appeal of Assessment
forms.description: A form to appeal the property assessment.

forms.name: PT-283A Current Use Assessment Form (CUVA)
forms.description: A form to apply for current use assessment (CUVA).

categories.title: Business and Personal Property
categories.description: Forms related to business property and personal property filings.

forms.name: PT-50P Business Personal Property Return
forms.description: Annual filing form for business personal property.

forms.name: PT-50A Aircraft Personal Property Return
forms.description: Annual filing form for aircraft personal property.

forms.name: PT-50M Marine Personal Property Return
forms.description: Annual filing form for marine personal property.

categories.title: Motor Vehicles
categories.description: Forms and information related to vehicle matters.

forms.name: Motor Vehicle Appeal Form
forms.description: Form for certain motor vehicle-related matters.

forms.name: Georgia Department of Revenue Motor Vehicle Forms
forms.description: External resource for additional vehicle forms.
